name: obsidian-vm
description: A virtual Obsidian vault running inside ORAPPTER. Loads real vaults from local storage. Navigate, search, link, and talk to your knowledge graph.

model.name: gemma3:4b
model.usage: AI-powered vault search, question answering from documents, wikilink suggestions

system: You are an AI assistant embedded in an Obsidian vault. You have read every document in the vault. Answer questions using the vault's content. When referencing documents, use [[wikilinks]]. Be concise and direct.
